description: Live device session 2026-04-29 10:15 (#116). Supermarket checkout area, locked on a person at a register. Source recorded at 240fps (slow-motion mode); re-encoded at 30fps for playback timing. ~20.7s, 622 frames. Live session 101547_person showed 6 reacqs in 71 engine-processed frames — diagnostic test for the same single-person cascade-scoring failure mode as walking_outdoor.
